children.heading: .—Predispute arbitration agreement
children.label: 1 .—Predispute arbitration agreement
children.text: The term “predispute arbitration agreement” means any agreement to arbitrate a dispute that had not yet arisen at the time of the making of the agreement.

children.heading: .—Predispute joint-action waiver
children.label: 2 .—Predispute joint-action waiver
children.text: The term “predispute joint-action waiver” means an agreement, whether or not part of a predispute arbitration agreement, that would prohibit, or waive the right of, one of the parties to the agreement to participate in a joint, class, or collective action in a judicial, arbitral, administrative, or other forum, concerning a dispute that has not yet arisen at the time of the making of the agreement.

children.heading: .—Sexual assault dispute
children.label: 3 .—Sexual assault dispute
children.text: The term “sexual assault dispute” means a dispute involving a nonconsensual sexual act or sexual contact, as such terms are defined in or similar applicable Tribal or State law, including when the victim lacks capacity to consent.section 2246 of title 18

children.heading: .—Sexual harassment dispute
children.label: 4 .—Sexual harassment dispute
children.text: The term “sexual harassment dispute” means a dispute relating to conduct that is alleged to constitute sexual harassment under applicable Federal, Tribal, or State law.
